Name: Delete Target or Worker Registration From Octopus
Description: Step that will attempt to delete a target or worker from Octopus Deploy using the API.  If it cannot delete the target or worker it will disable the target and rename it.
Author: octobob

Parameters.Name: DeleteTarget.Octopus.Base.Url
Parameters.Label: Octopus Base Url
Parameters.HelpText: The Base URL of the Octopus Deploy Server.  Example: https://samples.octopus.app

Parameters.Name: DeleteTarget.Octopus.Api.Key
Parameters.Label: Octopus API Key
Parameters.HelpText: The API key of a user who has permissions to delete a target from Octopus Deploy

Parameters.Name: DeleteTarget.Target.Name
Parameters.Label: Target Name
Parameters.HelpText: The Name of the Target to delete from Octopus Deploy

Parameters.Name: DeleteTarget.Target.TargetType
Parameters.Label: Target Type
Parameters.HelpText: What kind of registration is it, a worker or a deployment target
